chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, LARKANA C. P. No.D-330 of 2012. DATE OF HEARING ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF HON’BLE JUDGE For hearing of M.A.No.269/2022. 18.04.2023 Mr. Abdul Sattar Janvri, advocate for the petitioner. Mr. Asif Hussain Chandio, advocate for the respondents No.1 to 4. Mr. Ghulam Asghar Khichi, D.A.G At the very outset it is stated by learned counsel for the petitioner that he would not press the disposal of contempt application, if the petitioner is permitted to file the same afresh after curing the legal defect. Order accordingly. Judge Judge
